project.name: nnez-yisu
project.description: nnez-yisu is an open-source, third-party campus card client designed specifically for students at Nanning No. 2 High School. Built with Flutter, our app offers practical features ranging from real-time balance tracking and comprehensive consumption history to convenient desktop widgets and account management. We focus on delivering a modern, user-friendly experience to make managing daily campus expenses accessible and effortless for everyone.
